message:
fix(core/search): use dynamic Function-based import for optional transformer dependency

The previous @ts-expect-error approach for the optional @xenova/transformers
dependency caused bundlers (Vite, esbuild, webpack) to still analyze and
potentially fail on the static import statement, even though it was inside
a dynamic code path.

Changes:
- Replace direct dynamic import() with Function-based importer pattern
  that creates a true runtime-only import invisible to static analysis
- This allows bundlers to compile the code without requiring the
  optional dependency to be installed
- Add eslint-ignore comment documenting the intentional use of new Function

The transformer model provides optional semantic reranking for improved
search quality when available, but the CLI and web app should work
without it using hash-based fallback embeddings.

Includes test verifying dynamic text embedding for reranking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
